Product Details
Rubber Products

Customized rubber components for sealing, cushioning, insulation, and protection applications.

← Back to Product Center

Industrial Product

Rubber Products

Flexible custom manufacturing for diverse industrial environments and non-standard part requirements.

CHX Rubber Products can be tailored in shape, hardness, and compound selection to support protection, damping, and sealing objectives.

Custom Development

Supports drawings, samples, and application-driven custom production.

Versatile Applications

Suitable for equipment protection, vibration control, cable sealing, and more.

Compound Expertise

Material selection can be tuned for elasticity, resistance, and service environment.
